hero.question: Will Bitcoin dip to $45,000 by December 31, 2026?
hero.prob_take: Bears just took the wheel hard, dumping 10 points in a day, which signals either a capitulation flush or smart money hedging before year-end volatility. At 48.5%, the market's pricing in a coin flip when Bitcoin's 4-year macro cycle and institutional adoption trajectory make sub-45K odds closer to 35%, meaning YES is getting the short end here.

daily_take.headline: Bitcoin's $45K Floor Just Got 10 Points Cheaper. Time to Buy?
daily_take.deck: Bitcoin dip odds fell 10 points overnight to 48.5%, suggesting the market is getting nervous about overshooting lower. With $1.6M in volume and odds trading right at the coin flip, this is either a capitulation flush or a trap. The move feels emotional, not fundamental. Smart money is likely leaning into the dip here.
